## What are you adding or fixing?

<!-- One line is enough -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Link works and goes to the right place
- [ ] Description is under 120 characters and has no trailing period
- [ ] Entry is in alphabetical order within its section
- [ ] Added `[inactive]`, `[paid]`, or `[WIP]` badge if applicable
- [ ] Not already listed (I searched first)
